problem:
Streaming bypasses guardrails/middleware. If streaming the tokens is enabled, the middleware runs after the stream has been consumed. This means any guardrails or middleware is applied after the tokens have been consumed by the user. This leaks any information that would be should have been caught by the guardrails.

Is there anyway to control streaming so that content is scanned first/periodically then streamed to the user? (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
